basis: Phase 22 browser installation attempts + real Chromium Playwright execution checkpoint

commonmarkOfficialCorpusLane.summary: 652/652 official CommonMark corpus cases passed in the Phase 22 rerun.
notes: The zero-failure checkpoint result is achieved via the python-markdown-it-adapter path in the official-lane harness.
The native JS renderer proof-of-work baseline remains below full frozen-target parity; see Phase 21 markdown lane delta artifacts.

gfmOfficialCorpusLane.summary: 672/672 official GFM corpus cases passed in the Phase 22 rerun.
notes: The zero-failure checkpoint result is achieved via the python-markdown-it-adapter path in the official-lane harness.
The native JS renderer proof-of-work baseline remains below full frozen-target parity; see Phase 21 markdown lane delta artifacts.

optionalExtensionProfileLanes.summary: 8/8 claimed optional-profile checks passed in the Phase 22 rerun.

editorKeyboardLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20; no Phase 22 product-surface changes were applied to editor authoring semantics.

toolbarSelectionLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20; toolbar/selection evidence remains unchanged in this checkpoint.

previewExportLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20; preview/export evidence remains unchanged in this checkpoint.

accessibilityLane.summary: Inherited green accessibility-adjacent shell/settings/preview/i18n evidence from Phase 20 remains in force.

browserMatrixLane.summary: Chromium now executes 6/6 real Playwright logical cases successfully with policy quarantine and offline static-dependency stubbing, but the full Chromium/Firefox/WebKit matrix remains blocked because Firefox and WebKit executables are unavailable in this environment.
notes: Phase 21 Chromium smoke failed with ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ADMINISTRATOR before any logical browser cases executed.
Phase 22 quarantines /etc/chromium/policies/managed during real-browser execution and stubs offline external static assets referenced by the built client shell.
Playwright with --with-deps failed because apt could not resolve deb.debian.org.
Playwright browser-only install failed because the environment could not resolve cdn.playwright.dev.

visualRegressionLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20: 12/12 browser-rendered visual-diff checks passed.

packedTarballInstallLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20: 17/17 release-set tarballs packed and installed successfully from local artifacts.

extensionActivationCompatibilityLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20 extension activation and compatibility evidence.

docsContractBoundaryLane.summary: Inherited green from Phase 20 documentation and contract-boundary evidence.

noUnresolvedP0MarkdownConformanceFailure.note: The Phase 22 rerun records zero unresolved CommonMark/GFM failures in the helper-backed official harness, but certification remains blocked because the shipped native JS renderer proof-of-work baseline still sits below full frozen-target parity.

noUnresolvedP0UIXParityFailures.note: No new UIX parity failures were observed in the real Chromium Playwright execution. The remaining browser issue is missing cross-browser executables, not an observed Chromium UI failure.

noUnresolvedForbiddenBoundaryViolations.note: Inherited Phase 20 package boundary validation remains green.

noUnsignedUnverifiedExtensionArtifactWhe.note: Inherited Phase 20 extension artifact verification remains green.

noReleaseSetPackageLackingDocsTestsExamp.note: Inherited Phase 20 package documentation/evidence checks remain green.

certificationGate.detail: Chromium is now executing real Playwright checks successfully, but Firefox and WebKit cannot be installed or executed in this environment because the required apt/CDN endpoints are unreachable.
The zero-failure markdown rerun remains helper-backed; the shipped native JS renderer proof-of-work baseline still trails the frozen CommonMark/GFM target.

remainingBlockers: Playwright install endpoints unreachable from this environment
